case_title: THE PACIFIC BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION vs. HANDLEMAN, RONALD et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HANDLEMAN, RONALD
NOTICE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PACIFIC BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PACIFIC BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANDLEMAN, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 EDGEHILL WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT IS PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT IS STAYED TO AND INCLUDING SEPT. 10, 1993. 7/20/93 - CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDA- VIT OF MAILING FILED.
DEPT#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED IN DEPT.#6 ON 7-19-93.
